title: Visa Payment Account
description: Schema representing a Visa payment account with attributes used across Payment Account Validation, Payment Account Attributes Inquiry, Account Updater, and Card on File services.

primaryAccountNumber.description: Primary Account Number (PAN) of the Visa card

paymentAccountReference.description: Payment Account Reference (PAR) that uniquely identifies a cardholder account across multiple tokens and PANs

cardExpiryDate.description: Card expiration date in YYYY-MM format

cardholderName.description: Name of the cardholder as printed on the card

cardTypeCode.description: Code indicating the type of card account

cardProductType.description: Product type of the Visa card (e.g., Classic, Gold, Platinum, Infinite)

issuerName.description: Name of the financial institution that issued the card

issuerCountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 numeric country code of the card issuer

binNumber.description: Bank Identification Number (first 6-8 digits of the PAN)

accountStatus.description: Current status of the payment account

fastFundsIndicator.description: Indicates whether the issuer participates in Fast Funds service for the account

pushPaymentsIndicator.description: Indicates whether the account can receive push payment transactions

onlineGamblingBlockIndicator.description: Indicates whether online gambling transactions are blocked for this account

cardOnFileDetails.description: List of merchants with this card stored on file

tokenDetails.description: Token references associated with this account

Address.description: Physical address associated with the account

CardOnFileMerchant.description: Details of a merchant that has the card stored on file

enrollmentDate.description: Date the card was stored on file with this merchant

TokenReference.description: Reference to a token associated with the payment account

tokenRequestorId.description: Identifier of the entity that requested the token
